app.title: Azure Cost Advisor
app.tagline: Consultant-grade Azure cost analysis. In minutes.

free.name: Free
free.description: Run a scan and see your top 3 findings summary.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Full findings report with estimated savings.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Findings + IaC remediation templates + executive PDF.

status.title: Collecting data...
status.subtitle: ACA is pulling read-only data from your Azure subscription. This typically takes 2-4 minutes.

report.title: Free Scan Summary
report.opportunities: {{count}} opportunities identified. Upgrade for full details.
report.unlock_body: Get full narrative, risk ratings, evidence, and ready-to-run IaC implementation packages with Tier 2 or Tier 3.

connect.title: Connect Azure Subscription
connect.subtitle: ACA needs read-only access to your Azure subscription to run the cost analysis. No resources are modified.
connect.step1_label: Step 1: Enter your Azure Subscription ID

validation.subscription_required: Please enter your Azure subscription ID.

A.title: Mode A -- Delegated user sign-in (recommended)
A.desc: Quick scan using your own Azure credentials. Ideal for trial access.

B.title: Mode B -- Service principal
B.desc: Enterprise governance-friendly. You create an SP with Reader role.

tier3.title: Tier 3 -- Deliverable Package
benefits: Terraform + Bicep templates (parameterized for YOUR subscription)

login.tagline: Connect your Azure subscription and get a free prioritized cost report in minutes.
login.description: Read-only access. No resource modifications. Run a free Tier 1 scan with no credit card required. Unlock full advisory and IaC deliverables with Tier 2 and Tier 3.
login.dev_mode: Dev mode active (VITE_DEV_AUTH=true) — sign-in is bypassed.

consent.banner_body: We use Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity to improve the product. No Azure subscription data is included in analytics.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.
errors.preflight_failed: Pre-flight checks failed. Please review the required permissions.
errors.scan_failed: Scan failed. Please try again or contact support.
